rulings.Case Title: EVERETT ADAMS ET AL VS. DIPAK PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Requests For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Docment Requests, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs And Their Counsel Of Record, Jointly And Severally
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Requests For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Docment Requests, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs And Their Counsel Of Record, Jointly And Severally GRANTED. Opposition filed and served in violation of CCP 1005 is stricken. Additionally no courtesy copy of opposition was provided to the Court in violation of SFLR 2.7B. Complete responses without objections shall be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $7,860. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DWAINE BURGARDT VS. ST. CLARE LP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT ST. CLARE LP, SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a contract (written/oral, parties, terms of legal effect, etc) and a covenant express or implied that has been breached. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
